bash_commands.command:
# Verify all key files exist
files=(
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.h"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/ServoStyleSet.h"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/ServoStyleSet.cpp"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/PresShell.h"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/PresShell.cpp"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/nsLayoutUtils.cpp"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/painting/nsDisplayList.h"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/painting/nsDisplayList.cpp"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/gfx/layers/wr/WebRenderLayerManager.h"
  "/workspace/firefox--871325b8/gfx/layers/wr/WebRenderLayerManager.cpp"
)

for file in "${files[@]}"; do
  if [ -f "$file" ]; then
    echo "✓ $file"
  else
    echo "✗ $file"
  fi
done

# Verify key symbols exist
echo "=== RestyleManager signatures ==="
grep -n "PostRestyleEvent\|ProcessPendingRestyles\|ProcessRestyledFrames\|DoProcessPendingRestyles" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.h | head -10

echo -e "\n=== ServoStyleSet signatures ==="
grep -n "StyleDocument" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/ServoStyleSet.h | head -5

echo -e "\n=== PresShell signatures ==="
grep -n "FrameNeedsReflow\|SchedulePaint" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/PresShell.h | head -10

echo -e "\n=== nsLayoutUtils signatures ==="
grep -n "PaintFrame" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/nsLayoutUtils.h | head -5

echo -e "\n=== nsDisplayList signatures ==="
grep -n "class nsDisplayListBuilder\|class nsDisplayList\|PaintRoot" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/painting/nsDisplayList.h | head -10

echo -e "\n=== WebRenderLayerManager signatures ==="
grep -n "EndTransactionWithoutLayer" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/gfx/layers/wr/WebRenderLayerManager.h | head -5

# Check for ProcessPostTraversal
grep -n "ProcessPostTraversal" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -5

# Check ApplyRenderingChangeToTree which is called in the paint chain
grep -n "ApplyRenderingChangeToTree\|DoApplyRenderingChangeToTree" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -5

# Check for StyleChangeReflow
grep -n "static void StyleChangeReflow" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -5

# Look for where style changes are initiated in Element
grep -n "AttributeChanged\|NotifyAttributeChanged" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/dom/base/Element.cpp | head -10

# Find where RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent is called
grep -n "RestyleManager\|PostRestyleEvent" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/dom/base/Element.cpp | head -15

# Look for entry point where style changes propagate
grep -n "InvalidateStyle\|InvalidateRenderingObservers\|SchedulePaint" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -15

# Check if nsPresContext is involved in style updates
grep -n "StyleSet\|RestyleManager" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/nsPresContext.h | head -10

python3 -c "import json; f=json.load(open('answer.json')); print(f'Files: {len(f[\"files\"])}'); print(f'Symbols: {len(f[\"symbols\"])}'); print(f'Chain: {len(f[\"chain\"])}'); print('\\nFirst 3 chain entries:'); [print(f'  {i+1}. {c[\"path\"]} - {c[\"symbol\"]}') for i,c in enumerate(f['chain'][:3])]"

  "text": "CSS style changes in Firefox trigger a sophisticated multi-stage pipeline from style invalidation through layout to rendering. Here's how the chain works:\n\n**1. Style Change Notification (layout/style/RestyleManager)**\nWhen a CSS property changes (via style attribute modification, class changes, etc.), RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent() is called. This function (RestyleManager.h:315) queues a restyle request by calling Servo_NoteExplicitHints() to mark the element for style recomputation. The restyle event is queued rather than applied immediately, allowing batching of multiple style changes.\n\n**2. Frame Style Recomputation (layout/style/ServoStyleSet)**\nWhen layout flushes pending notifications, RestyleManager::DoProcessPendingRestyles() (RestyleManager.cpp:3087) invokes ServoStyleSet::StyleDocument() (ServoStyleSet.h:311). This performs the actual CSS style computation using the Servo style engine, traversing the DOM tree and recalculating computed styles. After style computation, RestyleManager::ProcessPostTraversal() (RestyleManager.cpp:2747) walks the frame tree to detect what needs to be updated.\n\n**3. Dirty-Frame Reflow Scheduling (layout/style/RestyleManager + layout/base/PresShell)**\nRestyleManager::ProcessRestyledFrames() (RestyleManager.cpp:1548) processes change hints generated by style differences. For layout-affecting changes, StyleChangeReflow() (RestyleManager.cpp:1326) is called, which invokes PresShell::FrameNeedsReflow() (PresShell.cpp:2632). This function marks frames as dirty (NS_FRAME_IS_DIRTY or NS_FRAME_HAS_DIRTY_CHILDREN state bits) and propagates the dirty state up the frame tree to reflow roots. The reflow will occur during the next flush.\n\n**4. Display List Construction (layout/base/nsLayoutUtils + layout/painting/nsDisplayList)**\nPresShell::SchedulePaint() (PresShell.cpp:4064) schedules a paint operation via the RefreshDriver. During the paint phase, PresShell::PaintInternal() (PresShell.cpp:6467) calls nsLayoutUtils::PaintFrame() (nsLayoutUtils.cpp:2834). This function creates an nsDisplayListBuilder and calls nsIFrame::BuildDisplayListForStackingContext() (line 3191) to recursively construct the display list. For WebRender, this may use RetainedDisplayListBuilder for partial updates or TemporaryDisplayListBuilder for full rebuilds.\n\n**5. WebRender Layer Update (gfx/layers/wr/WebRenderLayerManager)**\nThe constructed display list is passed to nsDisplayList::PaintRoot() (nsDisplayList.cpp:2348), which identifies the appropriate renderer. For WebRender (detected via LayersBackend::LAYERS_WR at line 2406), the display list is sent to WebRenderLayerManager via EndTransactionWithoutLayer() (WebRenderLayerManager.cpp). This function processes the display list through WebRenderCommandBuilder::CreateWebRenderCommandsFromDisplayList(), converting display items into WebRender display list items, and sends them to the WebRender renderer via IPC for GPU composition.\n\nThe entire chain is coordinated through nsPresContext, which holds both the RestyleManager and StyleSet, ensuring that style changes, layout, and rendering are properly synchronized during the refresh cycle."
}

conversation_events.text:
# Firefox CSS Style Resolution to Layout Paint Chain

## Your Task

Trace how a CSS style change triggers layout and paint in mozilla/gecko-dev. Find C++ source files implementing: the style change notification, the frame style recomputation, the dirty-frame reflow scheduling, the display list construction, and the WebRender layer update.

## Context

You are working on a codebase task involving repos from the crossrepo domain.

## Available Resources

The local `/workspace/` directory contains: sg-evals/firefox--871325b8.

**Note:** Additional repositories are accessible via Sourcegraph MCP tools:
- `sg-evals/firefox--871325b8` (mozilla-firefox/firefox)

## Output Format

Create a file at `/workspace/answer.json` with your findings in the following structure:

```json
{
  "files": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go"}
  ],
  "symbols": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "SymbolName"}
  ],
  "chain": [
    {"repo": "org/repo-name", "path": "relative/path/to/file.go", "symbol": "FunctionName"}
  ],
  "text": "Narrative explanation of your findings, citing repos and file paths."
}
```

Include only the fields relevant to this task. Your answer is evaluated against a closed-world oracle — completeness matters.

## Evaluation

Your answer will be scored on:
- **File recall and precision**: Did you find all relevant files?
I'll help you trace the CSS style resolution to layout paint chain in Firefox. Let me start by exploring the repository structure and finding the relevant C++ source files.
Now I have a good understanding of the CSS style resolution to layout paint chain. Let me gather all the key files:
Now let me verify a few more key functions that are part of the chain:
Now let me create the comprehensive answer file:

Perfect! I have successfully traced the CSS style resolution to layout paint chain in Firefox. Here's what I found:

## Summary

I've created a comprehensive analysis of how CSS style changes trigger layout and paint in Mozilla's Gecko engine, identifying 12 key files and 20 critical symbols that implement the five-stage pipeline:

### The Five-Stage Pipeline:

1. **Style Change Notification** - `RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent()` queues style updates when CSS properties change

2. **Frame Style Recomputation** - `ServoStyleSet::StyleDocument()` performs CSS computation using the Servo engine, with `RestyleManager::ProcessPostTraversal()` detecting what needs updating

3. **Dirty-Frame Reflow Scheduling** - `RestyleManager::ProcessRestyledFrames()` and `StyleChangeReflow()` invoke `PresShell::FrameNeedsReflow()` to mark frames dirty and schedule reflow

4. **Display List Construction** - `PresShell::SchedulePaint()` → `PaintInternal()` → `nsLayoutUtils::PaintFrame()` builds the display list via `nsIFrame::BuildDisplayListForStackingContext()`

5. **WebRender Layer Update** - `nsDisplayList::PaintRoot()` → `WebRenderLayerManager::EndTransactionWithoutLayer()` sends the display list to WebRender for GPU composition

The answer has been saved to `/workspace/answer.json` with all files, symbols, and a detailed narrative explaining the complete chain.

# Check for StyleChangeReflow
grep -n "static void StyleChangeReflow" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -5

# Look for where style changes are initiated in Element
grep -n "AttributeChanged\|NotifyAttributeChanged" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/dom/base/Element.cpp | head -10

# Find where RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent is called

# Look for entry point where style changes propagate
grep -n "InvalidateStyle\|InvalidateRenderingObservers\|SchedulePaint" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/style/RestyleManager.cpp | head -15

# Check if nsPresContext is involved in style updates
grep -n "StyleSet\|RestyleManager" /workspace/firefox--871325b8/layout/base/nsPresContext.h | head -10

  "text": "CSS style changes in Firefox trigger a sophisticated multi-stage pipeline from style invalidation through layout to rendering. Here's how the chain works:\n\n**1. Style Change Notification (layout/style/RestyleManager)**\nWhen a CSS property changes (via style attribute modification, class changes, etc.), RestyleManager::PostRestyleEvent() is called. This function (RestyleManager.h:315) queues a restyle request by calling Servo_NoteExplicitHints() to mark the element for style recomputation. The restyle event is queued rather than applied immediately, allowing batching of multiple style changes.\n\n**2. Frame Style Recomputation (layout/style/ServoStyleSet)**\nWhen layout flushes pending notifications, RestyleManager::DoProcessPendingRestyles() (RestyleManager.cpp:3087) invokes ServoStyleSet::StyleDocument() (ServoStyleSet.h:311). This performs the actual CSS style computation using the Servo style engine, traversing the DOM tree and recalculating computed styles. After style computation, RestyleManager::ProcessPostTraversal() (RestyleManager.cpp:2747) walks the frame tree to detect what needs to be updated.\n\n**3. Dirty-Frame Reflow Scheduling (layout/style/RestyleManager + layout/base/PresShell)**\nRestyleManager::ProcessRestyledFrames() (RestyleManager.cpp:1548) processes change hints generated by style differences. For layout-affecting changes, StyleChangeReflow() (RestyleManager.cpp:1326) is called, which invokes PresShell::FrameNeedsReflow() (PresShell.cpp:2632). This function marks frames as dirty (NS_FRAME_IS_DIRTY or NS_FRAME_HAS_DIRTY_CHILDREN state bits) and propagates the dirty state up the frame tree to reflow roots. The reflow will occur during the next flush.\n\n**4. Display List Construction (layout/base/nsLayoutUtils + layout/painting/nsDisplayList)**\nPresShell::SchedulePaint() (PresShell.cpp:4064) schedules a paint operation via the RefreshDriver. During the paint phase, PresShell::PaintInternal() (PresShell.cpp:6467) calls nsLayoutUtils::PaintFrame() (nsLayoutUtils.cpp:2834). This function creates an nsDisplayListBuilder and calls nsIFrame::BuildDisplayListForStackingContext() (line 3191) to recursively construct the display list. For WebRender, this may use RetainedDisplayListBuilder for partial updates or TemporaryDisplayListBuilder for full rebuilds.\n\n**5. WebRender Layer Update (gfx/layers/wr/WebRenderLayerManager)**\nThe constructed display list is passed to nsDisplayList::PaintRoot() (nsDisplayList.cpp:2348), which identifies the appropriate renderer. For WebRender (detected via LayersBackend::LAYERS_WR at line 2406), the display list is sent to WebRenderLayerManager via EndTransactionWithoutLayer() (WebRenderLayerManager.cpp). This function processes the display list through WebRenderCommandBuilder::CreateWebRenderCommandsFromDisplayList(), converting display items into WebRender display list items, and sends them to the WebRender renderer via IPC for GPU composition.\n\nThe entire chain is coordinated through nsPresContext, which holds both the RestyleManager and StyleSet, ensuring that style changes, layout, and rendering are properly synchronized during the refresh cycle."
}
